tool_definitions.name: run_sandboxed
tool_definitions.description: Run /bin/echo inside the OS sandbox (macOS Seatbelt or Linux bubblewrap) and return the captured stdout.

steps.message: Use the run_sandboxed tool to echo "hello from sandbox" and report the output.
